auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSent: We sent a password reset link to your email. Check your inbox.
auth.verifyEmailMessage: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.
auth.privacyNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

welcome.title: Welcome to gooflo!
welcome.subtitle: Transform your selfies with AI, endlessly.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Body: Take a photo with your camera or pick one from your gallery.
howItWorks.step2Body: Pick from hundreds of AI mods — anime, medieval, cyberpunk, and more.
howItWorks.step3Body: See your transformation in seconds and share it with the community.

firstGenerate.title: Your First Generation is Free!
firstGenerate.subtitle: Pick a mod and try it now.

empty.title: No Posts Yet
empty.body: Be the first to post in the community!

insufficient.title: Not Enough Credits
insufficient.body: This generation requires {{required}} credits. Buy more credits or go Pro.

mods.title: Mods
mods.modPromptPlaceholder: Describe the transformation you want AI to apply...

empty.title: No Mods Found
empty.body: No mods match your search criteria.

promptLibrary.title: Prompt Library
promptLibrary.placeholder: Write a prompt that creates amazing results...
promptLibrary.empty: No prompts yet. Be the first to share!

challenge.title: Daily Challenge
challenge.noChallenge: No challenge today. Check back tomorrow!

collections.title: Collection
collections.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this collection.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

validation.shortPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

noConnection.title: No Connection
noConnection.body: Check your internet connection and try again.

serverError.title: Something Went Wrong
serverError.body: Our servers are having issues. Please try again in a moment.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.body: The content you're looking for couldn't be found or may have been removed.

rateLimit.title: Too Many Requests
rateLimit.body: Please wait a moment and try again.

generationFailed.title: Generation Failed
generationFailed.body: There was an error processing your photo. Your credits have been refunded.

premiumRequired.title: Pro Feature
premiumRequired.body: This feature is exclusive to Gooflo Pro members.

camera.title: Camera Access
camera.body: We need camera access to take your selfie.

photoLibrary.title: Photo Library
photoLibrary.body: We need photo library access to pick a photo.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.body: Allow notifications for daily reminders and streak alerts.

permissions.denied: You can enable this in Settings.

pro.title: Gooflo Pro
pro.subtitle: Unlimited generations, premium mods, and much more.

maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
maintenance.body: We're preparing a better experience for you. Come back soon!

update.title: Update Required
update.body: You need to update the app to continue.
